description: Talk to the victim Jolene to understand their feelings/needs.

next_steps.content: It was just for the thrills—everyone does this. Didn’t think it was a big deal.

description: Post a public, supportive comment that educates the victim Jolene to recognize cyberstalking and to take self-protective measures.

next_steps.content: Thank you for saying that publicly. I’ll start locking things down now.
I agree—this has gone too far. Please stop posting about me.

description: Publicly educate the bully Jameson that their actions cause harm and constitute cyberstalking.

next_steps.content: Agreed—this crosses the line. Let’s remove it.

description: State that the behavior can be a criminal offense; many U.S. states have laws targeting cyberstalking.

description: Acknowledge and express sympathy that the bully Jameson may have been targeted by cyberstalking too, while still asking them to stop.

next_steps.content: Yeah… it happened to me once. I’ll take this down.

description: If the player accuses the bully Jameson of intentionally trying to harm the victim (without acknowledging lack of intent), the bully responds with anger and refuses to apologize.

next_steps.content: That’s not true. I’m not apologizing, and I’m not taking it down.
